version_description: This is the version she performs live in a lower key.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]F[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
[tab][ch]C[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
    It's fine, it's cool[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]Am[/ch]
You can say that we are nothing, but you know the truth[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
And guess I'm the fool[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]                              [ch]Am[/ch]
With her arms out like an angel through the car sunroof[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Dm9[/ch]
   I don't wanna call it off[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
  But you don't wanna call it love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm9[/ch]                               [ch]Dm[/ch]
   You only wanna be the one that I call baby[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
You can kiss a hundred boys in bars[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
Shoot another shot, try to stop the feeling[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
You can say it's just the way you are[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
Make a new excuse, another stupid reason[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]
Good luck, babe[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]
Well, good luck, babe[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]
You'd have to stop the world just to stop the feeling[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]
Good luck, babe[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]
Well, good luck, babe[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]
You'd have to stop the world just to stop the feeling[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
I'm cliche, who cares?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]Am[/ch]
It's a sexually explicit kind of love affair[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
And I cry, it's not fair[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]Am[/ch]
I just need a little lovin', I just need a little air[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Dm9[/ch]
   Think I'm gonna call it off[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
  Even if you call it love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm9[/ch]                              [ch]Dm[/ch]
   I just wanna love someone who calls me baby[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
You can kiss a hundred boys in bars[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
Shoot another shot, try to stop the feeling[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
You can say it's just the way you are[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
Make a new excuse, another stupid reason[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]
Good luck, babe[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]
Well, good luck, babe[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]
You'd have to stop the world just to stop the feeling[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]
Good luck, babe[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]
Well, good luck, babe[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]
You'd have to stop the world just to stop the feeling[/tab]


[tab][Interlude]
[ch]Dm9[/ch] [ch]Dm[/ch]
Ah-ah-ah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm9[/ch]  [ch]Dm[/ch]
Yeah-oh[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]
When you wake up next to him in the middle of the night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
With your head in your hands, you're nothing more than his wife[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
And when you think about me, all of those years ago[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
You're standing face to face with "I told you so"[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
You know I hate to say it, I told you so[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
You know I hate to say, but I told you so[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
You can kiss a hundred boys in bars[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]Am[/ch]
Shoot another shot, try to stop the feeling[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
You can say it's just the way you are[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
Make a new excuse, another stupid reason[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]
Good luck, babe[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]
Well, good luck, babe[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]
You'd have to stop the world just to stop the feeling[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]
Good luck, babe[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]
Well, good luck, babe[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]
You'd have to stop the world just to stop the feeling[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]
You'd have to stop the world just to stop the feeling[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]
You'd have to stop the world just to stop the feeling[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
You'd have to stop the world just to stop the feeling[/tab]
